SEARCH
Package com.unimib.assignment3.repository

Interface EmployeeRepository

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<Employee,Long>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Employee,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<Employee,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<Employee,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<Employee,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<Employee>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<Employee,Long>
public interface EmployeeRepository extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Employee,Long>
Repository interface for managing Employee entities. Extends JpaRepository to provide CRUD operations and custom queries.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    countEmailsStartingWithEmailPrefix(String emailPrefix)
    Counts the number of employees whose email starts with a given prefix.
    List<Employee>
    findEmployeeByEmployeeRole(EmployeeRole employeeRole)
    Retrieves all employees with a specific role.
    List<Employee>
    findEmployeeByEmployeeRoleOrderByMonthlySalaryAsc(EmployeeRole employeeRole)
    Retrieves all employees with a specific role, ordered by monthly salary ascending.
    List<Employee>
    findEmployeeByEmployeeRoleOrderByMonthlySalaryDesc(EmployeeRole employeeRole)
    Retrieves all employees with a specific role, ordered by monthly salary descending.
    List<Employee>
    findEmployeeByMonthlySalary(Double monthlySalary)
    Retrieves all employees with a specific monthly salary.
    List<Employee>
    findEmployeeByMonthlySalaryOrderByEmployeeRoleAsc(Double monthlySalary)
    Retrieves all employees with a specific monthly salary, ordered by role ascending.
    List<Employee>
    findEmployeeByMonthlySalaryOrderByEmployeeRoleDesc(Double monthlySalary)
    Retrieves all employees with a specific monthly salary, ordered by role descending.
    List<Task>
    findTasksByEmployeeByTaskState(Long employeeId, TaskState taskState)
    Retrieves all tasks of a specific employee that are in a given state.
    List<Task>
    findTasksByEmployeeByTaskStateBetweenDates(Long employeeId, TaskState taskState, LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate)
    Retrieves all tasks of a specific employee that are in a given state, between dates.
    List<Task>
    findTasksByEmployeeByTaskStateByEndDate(Long employeeId, TaskState taskState, LocalDate endDate)
    Retrieves all tasks of a specific employee that are in a given state and an ending date.
    List<Task>
    findTasksByEmployeeByTaskStateByStartDate(Long employeeId, TaskState taskState, LocalDate startDate)
    Retrieves all tasks of a specific employee that are in a given state and a starting date.
    List<Task>
    findTasksByEmployeeByTaskStateOrderByEndDateDesc(Long employeeId, TaskState taskState)
    Retrieves all tasks of a specific employee that are in a given state, ordered by start date descending.
    List<Task>
    findTasksByEmployeeByTaskStateOrderByStartDateDesc(Long employeeId, TaskState taskState)
    Retrieves all tasks of a specific employee that are in a given state, ordered by start date descending.

  • Method Details

    • findEmployeeByMonthlySalary

      List<Employee> findEmployeeByMonthlySalary(Double monthlySalary)
      Retrieves all employees with a specific monthly salary.
      Parameters:
      monthlySalary - the monthly salary to filter employees by.
      Returns:
      a list of employees with the given monthly salary.

    • findEmployeeByMonthlySalaryOrderByEmployeeRoleAsc

      List<Employee> findEmployeeByMonthlySalaryOrderByEmployeeRoleAsc(Double monthlySalary)
      Retrieves all employees with a specific monthly salary, ordered by role ascending.
      Parameters:
      monthlySalary - the monthly salary to filter employees by.
      Returns:
      a list of employees ordered by role in ascending order.

    • findEmployeeByMonthlySalaryOrderByEmployeeRoleDesc

      List<Employee> findEmployeeByMonthlySalaryOrderByEmployeeRoleDesc(Double monthlySalary)
      Retrieves all employees with a specific monthly salary, ordered by role descending.
      Parameters:
      monthlySalary - the monthly salary to filter employees by.
      Returns:
      a list of employees ordered by role in descending order.

    • findEmployeeByEmployeeRole

      List<Employee> findEmployeeByEmployeeRole(EmployeeRole employeeRole)
      Retrieves all employees with a specific role.
      Parameters:
      employeeRole - the role to filter employees by.
      Returns:
      a list of employees with the given role.

    • findEmployeeByEmployeeRoleOrderByMonthlySalaryAsc

      List<Employee> findEmployeeByEmployeeRoleOrderByMonthlySalaryAsc(EmployeeRole employeeRole)
      Retrieves all employees with a specific role, ordered by monthly salary ascending.
      Parameters:
      employeeRole - the role to filter employees by.
      Returns:
      a list of employees ordered by monthly salary in ascending order.

    • findEmployeeByEmployeeRoleOrderByMonthlySalaryDesc

      List<Employee> findEmployeeByEmployeeRoleOrderByMonthlySalaryDesc(EmployeeRole employeeRole)
      Retrieves all employees with a specific role, ordered by monthly salary descending.
      Parameters:
      employeeRole - the role to filter employees by.
      Returns:
      a list of employees ordered by monthly salary in descending order.

    • findTasksByEmployeeByTaskState

      @Query("SELECT t FROM employee d JOIN d.tasks t WHERE d.personId = :employeeId AND t.taskState = :taskState") List<Task> findTasksByEmployeeByTaskState(@Param("employeeId") Long employeeId, @Param("taskState") TaskState taskState)
      Retrieves all tasks of a specific employee that are in a given state.
      Parameters:
      employeeId - the ID of the employee.
      taskState - the state of the tasks to filter by.
      Returns:
      a list of tasks assigned to the employee in the specified state.

    • findTasksByEmployeeByTaskStateByStartDate

      @Query("SELECT t FROM employee d JOIN d.tasks t WHERE d.personId = :employeeId AND t.taskState = :taskState AND t.startDate = :startDate") List<Task> findTasksByEmployeeByTaskStateByStartDate(@Param("employeeId") Long employeeId, @Param("taskState") TaskState taskState, @Param("startDate") LocalDate startDate)
      Retrieves all tasks of a specific employee that are in a given state and a starting date.
      Parameters:
      employeeId - the ID of the employee.
      taskState - the state of the tasks to filter by.
      startDate - the start date to order the tasks by.
      Returns:
      a list of tasks assigned to the employee in a given startDate.

    • findTasksByEmployeeByTaskStateByEndDate

      @Query("SELECT t FROM employee d JOIN d.tasks t WHERE d.personId = :employeeId AND t.taskState = :taskState AND t.endDate = :endDate") List<Task> findTasksByEmployeeByTaskStateByEndDate(@Param("employeeId") Long employeeId, @Param("taskState") TaskState taskState, @Param("endDate") LocalDate endDate)
      Retrieves all tasks of a specific employee that are in a given state and an ending date.
      Parameters:
      employeeId - the ID of the employee.
      taskState - the state of the tasks to filter by.
      endDate - the start date to order the tasks by.
      Returns:
      a list of tasks assigned to the employee in a given startDate.

    • findTasksByEmployeeByTaskStateBetweenDates

      @Query("SELECT t FROM employee d JOIN d.tasks t WHERE d.personId = :employeeId AND t.taskState = :taskState AND t.startDate <= :endDate AND t.endDate >= :startDate") List<Task> findTasksByEmployeeByTaskStateBetweenDates(@Param("employeeId") Long employeeId, @Param("taskState") TaskState taskState, @Param("startDate") LocalDate startDate, @Param("endDate") LocalDate endDate)
      Retrieves all tasks of a specific employee that are in a given state, between dates.
      Parameters:
      employeeId - the ID of the employee.
      taskState - the state of the tasks to filter by.
      startDate - the start date to order the tasks by.
      endDate - the start date to order the tasks by.
      Returns:
      a list of tasks assigned to the employee in a given startDate.

    • findTasksByEmployeeByTaskStateOrderByStartDateDesc

      @Query("SELECT t FROM employee d JOIN d.tasks t WHERE d.personId = :employeeId AND t.taskState = :taskState ORDER BY t.startDate DESC") List<Task> findTasksByEmployeeByTaskStateOrderByStartDateDesc(@Param("employeeId") Long employeeId, @Param("taskState") TaskState taskState)
      Retrieves all tasks of a specific employee that are in a given state, ordered by start date descending.
      Parameters:
      employeeId - the ID of the employee.
      taskState - the state of the tasks to filter by.
      Returns:
      a list of tasks assigned to the employee ordered by startState.

    • findTasksByEmployeeByTaskStateOrderByEndDateDesc

      @Query("SELECT t FROM employee d JOIN d.tasks t WHERE d.personId = :employeeId AND t.taskState = :taskState ORDER BY t.endDate DESC") List<Task> findTasksByEmployeeByTaskStateOrderByEndDateDesc(@Param("employeeId") Long employeeId, @Param("taskState") TaskState taskState)
      Retrieves all tasks of a specific employee that are in a given state, ordered by start date descending.
      Parameters:
      employeeId - the ID of the employee.
      taskState - the state of the tasks to filter by.
      Returns:
      a list of tasks assigned to the employee ordered by endDate.

    • countEmailsStartingWithEmailPrefix

      @Query("SELECT COUNT(d) FROM employee d WHERE LOWER(d.email) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT(:emailPrefix, \'%\'))") int countEmailsStartingWithEmailPrefix(@Param("emailPrefix") String emailPrefix)
      Counts the number of employees whose email starts with a given prefix. The comparison is case-insensitive.
      Parameters:
      emailPrefix - the email prefix to search for.
      Returns:
      the count of employees with emails starting with the prefix.
